characters.name: Animal Helpers
characters.description: The Animal Helpersis a segment in theZoboomafootelevision series. In this segment, they send a message to the Kratt Brothers and Zoboo about other creatures. They first appeared in The Nose Knows.

characters.name: Animal Helpers

characters.name: Big Red
characters.description: Big Redis an adult malered kangaroothat appeared in "Jumpers", and reappeared in "Bovine".  He is a very athletic kangaroo. Big Red as he appeared in "Mystery Animal" in "Jumpers"

characters.name: Blink
characters.description: Blinkis a femalegreat horned owland one of the birds that send messages to Chris, Martin, andZoboofrom theAnimal Helpers. A great horned owl first appeared to deliver Jackie's message in the episode "Night Time".  Chris had trouble falling asleep due to an unknown growling noise.  However, he heard a hooting noise and knew who made that one.  Martin, who was asleep, muttered "Duck", while Zoboo, who was also asleep, muttered "great horned owl".  Chris then gets his headlamp on to find out.  He then sees the owl with the message, checking out the bird's eyes and stating that Animal Junction doesn't look dark to this great horned owl.  At this point, Martin wakes up, wondering what's going on, only to run into a support beam.  He then gets his headlamp on and says that having owl eyes would be great for getting up at night.  He also says that he loves how the owl swivels his head around so his eyes can look in any direction.  Both Kratts then read the message the owl brought.  Since this great horned owl is a male, he's not Blink. Blink delivered Any's message in "Bovine".  Zoboomafoo gave Blink her name because of the way she blinks.

characters.name: Blink
characters.description: Blinkis a femalegreat horned owland one of the birds that send messages to Chris, Martin, andZoboofrom theAnimal Helpers. Blink delivered Any's message in "Bovine".  Zoboomafoo gave Blink her name because of the way she blinks.

characters.name: Brainiac
characters.description: Brainiacis a femalechimpanzee(specifically aneastern chimpanzee) who is smart and made her first appearance in "Brain Power" and she reappeared in "Talk to Me", "Creature Neighbors" (flashback), "Buddies", "Can You Feel It?", and "Ants and Eaters". She is very adept at using machinery and computers. She is also a friend ofLost and Foundthedog. Brainiac as she appeared in "Mystery Animal" in "Brain Power"

characters.description: Chewyis an adult femaleHolstein Friesiancowand the mother ofGooey.  They both appeared in "Bovine".Zoboomafoonamed her Chewy because she chews on her cud a lot. Gooey and Chewy as they appeared in "Mystery Animal" in "Bovine".

characters.name: Chris and Martin (jaguars)
characters.description: Chris and Martinare a pair of maleblack jaguarcubs that appeared in "Eye Spy" along with an adult black jaguar (possiblyJagwater).  They were presumably named after bothKratt brothers(both jaguars are also brothers). One of the jaguar brothers showed up when his brother was eating the meat provided from theSnack Machineon a plate. Later, their fatherJagwatercame over and later took his sons home. They first appear inEye Spy, but make return appearances inCatsandRunning 1 of the jaguar cubs (either Chris or Martin) as he appeared in "Mystery Animal"

characters.description: Chris and Martinare a pair of malelioncubs that appeared inItchy.They were both named byZobooafter theKratt Brothers, because they're also brothers. They first appear inItchy, but make return appearances inFamilies,H2OandMessy and Clean.

characters.name: Climber, Climby, Climate, Climberadoo, and Stinky
characters.description: Climber, Climby, Climate, Climberadoo, and Stinky are five coatis who are siblings and appeared the episode,Climbing.

characters.name: Coatis
characters.description: Coatis, also known ascoatimundisandhog-nosed coons, are members of the generaNasuaandNasuellain the subtribeNasuinain theraccoonfamily (Procyonidae), a diurnalmammalnative to South America, Central America, and south-western North America.  The term is reported to be derived from the Tupi language of Brazil. Coatis, specifically thewhite-nosed coati, are featured in several episodes. Coatis first appeared in "The Nose Knows".  A pair of white-nosed coatis were in Animal Junction withZoboomafoowhen theKratt Brotherscame back from returningToothbrushtheelephantto his herd.

characters.name: Edmontosaurus
characters.description: Edmontosaurus, meaning "Edmonton lizard", is a genus ofhadrosaurid(duck-billed) dinosaur. It contains 2 known species:Edmontosaurus regalis(regalis meaning "royal"), andEdmontosaurus annectens(annectens meaning "connected"). Fossils of Edmontosaurus regalis have been found in rocks of Canada and Alaska that date from the late Campanian stage of the Cretaceous Period, 76 - 73 million years ago, while those of E. annectens were found in the western United States of North America, but in rocks dated to the end of the Maastrichtian stage of the Cretaceous, 65 million years ago. Edmontosaurus was one of the last non-avian dinosaurs, and lived alongside dinosaurs like Ornithomimus,TriceratopsandTyrannosaurusshortly before the Cretaceous–Paleogene extinction event. A pair of Edmontosaurus (calledduck-billed dinosaursin the series; possibly a male and a female) appeared in "Dinosaurs", "Giants", and "Crocodilian". Duck-Billed Dinosaur Heads

characters.name: Edmontosaurus
characters.description: Edmontosaurus, meaning "Edmonton lizard", is a genus ofhadrosaurid(duck-billed) dinosaur. It contains 2 known species:Edmontosaurus regalis(regalis meaning "royal"), andEdmontosaurus annectens(annectens meaning "connected"). Fossils of Edmontosaurus regalis have been found in rocks of Canada and Alaska that date from the late Campanian stage of the Cretaceous Period, 76 - 73 million years ago, while those of E. annectens were found in the western United States of North America, but in rocks dated to the end of the Maastrichtian stage of the Cretaceous, 65 million years ago. Edmontosaurus was one of the last non-avian dinosaurs, and lived alongside dinosaurs like Ornithomimus,TriceratopsandTyrannosaurusshortly before the Cretaceous–Paleogene extinction event. A pair of Edmontosaurus (calledduck-billed dinosaursin the series; possibly a male and a female) appeared in "Dinosaurs", "Giants", and "Crocodilian". Duck-Billed Dinosaur Heads

characters.name: Fibby
characters.description: Fibby(sometimes spelledPhibby) is sea creature fromZobooland. She has a strange orangefish-like body with eye stalks, nostrils, fins, weirdcoral-like spines, and a fish mouth; 2 greenoctopustentacles with yellow suckers; 2 redcrabclaws, and a big bluewhaletail fluke. Most of her appearances show her submerged, but some stories show her entire body.

characters.name: Hadrosaurids
characters.description: Hadrosaurids, meaning "heavy lizards", also calledhadrosaursorduck-billeddinosaursfor the flat, duck-bill appearance of their mouths, are members of the ornithischian familyHadrosauridae.  The family, which includes ornithopods such asEdmontosaurusand Parasaurolophus, was a common herbivore in the Upper Cretaceous Period of what is now Asia, Europe, Antarctica, South America and North America.  Hadrosaurids are descendants of the Upper Jurassic/Lower Cretaceous iguanodontian dinosaurs and had a similar body layout. Like the rest of the ornithischians, these animals had a predentary bone and a pubic bone which was positioned backwards in the pelvis.  Hadrosauridae is divided into 2 principal subfamilies: the lambeosaurines (Lambeosaurinae), which had hollow cranial crests or tubes; and the saurolophines (Saurolophinae), identified as hadrosaurines (Hadrosaurinae) in most pre-2010 works, which lacked hollow cranial crests (solid crests were present in some forms).  Saurolophines tended to be bulkier than lambeosaurines.  Lambeosaurines included the aralosaurins, tsintaosaurins, lambeosaurins and parasaurolophins, while saurolophines included the brachylophosaurins, kritosaurins, saurolophins and edmontosaurins. Hadrosaurids were facultative bipeds, with the young of some species walking mostly on two legs and the adults walking mostly on four.  Their jaws were evolved for grinding plants, with multiple rows of teeth replacing each other as the teeth wore down.

characters.name: Heidi
characters.description: Heidiis theKratt Brothers'petSt. Bernard.  She appeared in a home movie of their past  and her birthday in "Happy Lemur Day".

characters.description: Hop is aGolden Retrieverthat appeared in "Puppies".

characters.name: Hop's Puppies
characters.description: Hop's Puppiesare the 8 puppies ofHopwho appeared with her in "Puppies".  Aside fromLost and Found, who appeared fully grown in other episodes, the other puppies are named (byZoboo)Heidi,Ruffy,Yellow Dog(the only other yellow puppy after Lost and Found),Stinky,Chris,Martin(both named after theKratt Brothers), andFloppy.

characters.name: Iguana
characters.description: Iguanais agreen iguanathat likes to shake his head up and down, especially at funny moments.  He first appeared in "Dinosaurs".  WhenZoboomafoofirst found him, he asked Chris and Martin if it was a dinosaur.  He and his spines reminds Chris of the dinosaurStegosaurus.  Another green iguana (possibly him) appeared in "Lids".

characters.name: Jagwater
characters.description: Jagwateris an adult maleblack jaguarand the father ofa pair of black jaguar cubs named after Chris and Martin.  He loves playing basketball and swimming in theKratt Brothers' pool inAnimal Junction.

characters.name: Kids
characters.description: The Kidsare a group of children that first appeared inPlaytimeand returned inHumans. In their second appearance, they invite the Kratt Brothers and Zoboo to a tour of their school. As of 2023, all the young actors that played the Kids are now adults.
